response.justification: The candidate has a strong background in full-stack development with experience in TypeScript, Node.js, and React, aligning with the primary stack. They also have a broad range of experience with various technologies and have worked on complex projects.
strengths: Proficient in TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling
concerns: No direct mention of experience with Nest.js or Vitest
Limited experience with Kotlin/Java for backend services
Some experience is with older technologies or different stacks
